'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 9''' was the ninth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[February 27]], [[2002]]. The issue was authored by [[Darren Allanson]], [[Andrew Darling]], [[Chris Gardner]], and [[Iain Lowson]]. It also featured original artwork by [[Carl Lyons]] and [[Tig Sutton]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|The Boonta Eve Classic Podrace]] {{C|POD 1-4}}
**<small>How the result of Tatooine's biggest podrace to influence galactic history.</small>
*[[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] {{C|CHE 9-12}}
**<small>What befell the Wookiee who was one of the great heroes of the Rebellion.</small>
*[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Quarsh Panaka/Legends|Panaka]] {{C|PAN 1-4}}
**<small>Leader of Naboo's Royal Security Forces.</small>
*[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] - [[Galactic City/Legends|Imperial City]] {{C|COR 5-8}}
**<small>Under the Empire, the heart of Coruscant was turned to a new purpose.</small>
*Droid Manufacturers {{C|MAN 1-2}}
**<small>Industrial Automaton is one of the premmier droid mmanufacturers in the galaxy.</small>
*[[Electrobinoculars/Legends|Electrobinoculars]] {{C|ELE 1-4}}
**<small>Used in war and peace, electrobinoculars give a close-up view of distant events.</small>
*[[Single Trooper Aerial Platform/Legends|STAP (Single Trooper Aerial Platform)]] {{C|STA 1-2}}
**<small>Fast, agile and heavily armed attack platforms of the Trade Federation army.</small>

==Development==
The Chewbacca article includes original artwork by [[Carl Lyons]] depicting Chewbacca and the STAP article includes original artwork depicting a blueprint line illustration of the STAP by [[Tig Sutton]].
